# Let's load the files
import json, re, unicodedata, os, math, itertools, collections

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)

len(quran_data), len(hadith_data)[:3] if isinstance(hadith_data, list) else type(hadith_data)

import re
import unicodedata

def strip_diacritics(s):
    # Remove Arabic diacritics
    # Diacritics range
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    return s

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ''
    s = s.strip()
    # unify whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    # Remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # Normalize quotes/punct
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9 ]+', ' ', s)
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    # normalize alif forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.lower()
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

original_full = "فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهُمْ قُلْنَا لَهُمْ أَجَلَكُمْ مُسْتَفْرَغٌ فَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ أَجَلُكُمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ أَجَلَكُمْ فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهُمْ قُلْنَا لَهُمْ كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا كَمَا أَكَلَ وَأَشْرَبَ أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ أَجَلُكُمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ أَجَلَكُمْ فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهُمْ قُلْنَا لَهُمْ كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا كَمَا أَكَلَ وَأَشْرَبَ أَبْوَابُ الس"
snippet = "فَإِذَا جَ...ْوَابُ الس"

norm_full = normalize_ar(original_full)
norm_full[:200], len(norm_full)

candidates_fa = [v for v in quran_data if 'فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهُمْ' in v['ayah_text'] or 'فاذا جاء اجلهم' in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
[(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in candidates_fa]

candidates_ja = [v for v in quran_data if 'جَاءَ أَجَلُهُمْ' in v['ayah_text'] or 'جاء اجلهم' in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
[(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in candidates_ja]

kul_wa = [v for v in quran_data if 'كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا' in v['ayah_text'] or 'كلوا واشربوا' in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
[(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in kul_wa]

abw = [v for v in quran_data if 'أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاءِ' in v['ayah_text'] or 'ابواب السماء' in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
[(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in abw]

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # char-level LCS dynamic programming
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                if dp[j] < dp[j-1]:
                    dp[j] = dp[j-1]
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = normalize_ar(a).split()
    tb = normalize_ar(b).split()
    ca = collections.Counter(ta)
    cb = collections.Counter(tb)
    inter = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if inter == 0:
        return 0.0
    prec = inter / sum(ca.values())
    rec = inter / sum(cb.values())
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

full_norm = normalize_ar(original_full)
full_norm[:100]

cands = candidates_ja  # list from above

for v in cands:
    cand_text = v['ayah_text']
    lcs = lcs_length(normalize_ar(cand_text), full_norm)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / len(normalize_ar(cand_text)) if cand_text else 0
    tf1 = token_f1(cand_text, full_norm)
    print((v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id']), lcs_ratio, tf1, cand_text)

# Compute token F1 for all verses vs FULL substring
scores = []
for v in quran_data:
    t = v['ayah_text']
    score = token_f1(t, original_full)
    scores.append((score, v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], t))

scores_sorted = sorted(scores, reverse=True)[:10]
scores_sorted[:5]

# search quran for phrases strongly resembling "حتى يأتي أجلكم"
phrases = ["حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ أَجَلُكُمْ", "حتى يأتي أجلكم", "حتى يأتي اجل", "حتى يأتي أجلك", "حتى يأتي أجلها", "حتى يأتي أجلهم"]
for ph in phrases:
    hits = [v for v in quran_data if ph in v['ayah_text'] or normalize_ar(ph) in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
    print(ph, len(hits), [(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id']) for v in hits[:5]])

# Search for "وَإِنَّكُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ"
hits = [v for v in quran_data if 'وَإِنَّكُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ' in v['ayah_text'] or 'وانكم تعلمون' in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
hits[:5], len(hits)
